creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Uh... a bit premature with that patch-ready. :) From what I see this patch actually downgrades, because the diff is in reverse. Can you please submit the patch created by 'svn diff dns/knot2' in the root of the ports tree?

Can you also please confirm the update passes tests like portlint and poudriere or porttools' port test?
